creator: billblake2018@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Ed Maste from comment #2)

I verified that my sources say the same, then tried to reproduce the problem.  I wasn't able to; the loader and the kernel at startup both show a module_path containing /boot/modules.

I've taken the hack from my rc.local and pefs still works.  So somewhere during my upgrade I must have fat-fingered something or misread an error message or something equally stupid.  And my hack was totally unnecessary; my problem probably would have gone away on its own at the next reboot.

What's the bug status for "User has egg on his face?" :)
